title: Hygrothermal Property
description: Schema for a hygrothermal property record. Captures moisture transport and thermal-moisture interaction properties including vapor permeance, moisture absorption, and wet thermal conductivity.

property_id.description: Unique identifier for this hygrothermal property record.

material_ref.description: Reference to the parent material ID.

unit.description: Unit of measurement (e.g., perms, % by weight, kg/m2·s^0.5, BTU·in/hr·ft2·°F).

test_method_ref.description: Reference to the test method standards record.

temperature.description: Temperature at which the property was measured (e.g., '73°F').

rh_conditions.description: Relative humidity conditions during measurement (e.g., '50% RH dry cup', '0-50% RH gradient').
